rules.condition: Product contains any ingredient from the haram_ingredients list.
rules.description: If the product contains explicitly prohibited ingredients like pork derivatives or alcohol, it is considered Haram.

rules.condition: Product has a recognized Halal certification.
rules.description: If the product is certified by a recognized Halal authority, it overrides doubtful ingredients and is considered Halal.

rules.condition: Product contains ingredients from the mushbooh_ingredients list and is NOT Halal certified.
rules.description: Ingredients that could be derived from either animal or plant sources (like generic glycerin or gelatin) make the product doubtful unless certified.

rules.condition: Product contains only universally safe (Halal) ingredients and no Mushbooh/Haram ingredients.
rules.description: If all ingredients are naturally Halal (e.g., water, salt, pure plant derivatives) and there's no contamination, it is Halal.

logic_examples: IF ingredient IN haram_ingredients THEN status = 'Haram'
IF certification IN halal_certifications THEN status = 'Halal'
IF ingredient == 'gelatin' AND certification NOT IN halal_certifications AND origin != 'plant' AND origin != 'fish' THEN status = 'Mushbooh'
IF ingredient == 'ethanol' AND amount > 0.1% THEN status = 'Haram' (Subject to specific madhab/fatwa)
